race.comment: DECALOGUE (3) finished fourth two back in the Group 2 Tulloch Stakes. Went around at $1.75 last start on the back of that performance but was beaten a neck over 1900m at Canterbury. Not as much depth to this field and he should be breaking through. GOLD CUP (11) appreciated the step up in distance when a closing second over 1900m here recently. Lightly raced filly who is cherry ripe after two runs back from a spell and should be in the finish. THINK I WILL (7) has only raced twice and wasn't beaten far on either occasion. Bred to appreciate getting out to this distance so worth keeping in mind. SCOOP THE POOL (4) is a top-four contender dropping back to the provincials. ALADDIN'S GIRL (8) has been getting back then finding the line well. The addition of blinkers might liven her up in the early stages this time.
